name: Party Cheese Ball
directions: Combine cream cheese and cheddar cheese, mixing until well  blended.
Add  remaining ingredients; mix well.
Chill for 1/2-1 hour and then form into a  ball.
Roll ball in the chopped nuts until well covered.
Keep in refrigerator  until ready to serve. Can be made up to 48 hrs prior to serving.

name: Christmas Cheese Ball
directions: Combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
Shape into 2 balls.
Roll in the pecans.
Cover and chill.
Remove from refrigerator 15 minutes before serving.
Serve with crackers.

name: Cheesed off Chille Burger
directions: Mix all the ingredients together except the cheese slices and chiles.
Shape the mixture into 10 thin patties, each about 10cm in diameter.
Place 1 cheese slice and 1 tsp of the chiles on each of 5 patties.
Then place the remaining 5 patties on top of the cheese and peppers sealing the edges of the patty's firmly so that the cheese and peppers are the filling of the burgers.
Grill the patties on high heat, turning once, until they are cooked as desired.

name: Spinach Dip in a Flash
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl; transfer to a greased pie plate and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Serve hot w/ fresh sliced bread.

name: Cheddar Cheese Ball
directions: Put cream cheese into small mixing bowl and beat until creamy.
Add remaining ingredients except nuts.
Blend well.
Shape into a ball and roll in nuts.
Chill.

name: Cheese Ball
directions: Mix cream cheese and grated cheese.
The best way to do this is by hand.
Mix in all other ingredients except pecans and paprika.
Form into a ball.
Crush pecans and place on waxed paper.
Sprinkle paprika and place on a second sheet of wax paper.
Roll cheese ball in paprika and then in crushed pecans.
Place on plate and serve.
May chill in refrigerator if desired.
This recipe makes a very large cheese ball.
Recipe can be halfed if desired.

name: Chili Cheese Balls
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a medium bowl,mix well.
Shape into 1 inch balls.
Sprinkle chili powder in a large bowl,add cheese balls,and toss gently to coat.
Cover and chill.

name: Cheese Cups
directions: Put parchment paper on a cookie sheeet.
Put the cheddar cheese in a 4 inch circle about 1/4 inch thick on the parchment paper.
Put in oven at 350 for 3 minutes.
Then cut around each 4 inch circle and lay cheese side over a drinking glass remove parchment paper and mould cheese down around side of glass.
When cool remove and you will have a little cup.
Fill cup with your favorite ingredients or filling I used.

name: Mini Cream Cheese Balls
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
With wet hands, form small balls, about the size of cherry tomatoes.
Chill until firm.
Roll balls in chopped nuts, minced red or green peppers, or fresh herbs.

name: Garlic Roquefort Dip or Spread
directions: Grate cheddar into a mixing bowl and crumble in Roquefort cheese.
Add cottage cheese and blend throughly. Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
Place in a covered bowl and refrigerate until ready to use.
Serve as a dip or a spread.

name: Olive and Cheddar Cheese Ball
directions: Cream together all ingredients.  Shape into log or ball and roll in roasted sunflower seeds.
Bring out 1/2 hour before serving.

name: Tasty Cheese Ball
directions: In a food processor, blend all the cheeses together until creamy and smooth.
Add the pepper and garlic salt and mix until blended.
Form the cheese into a ball and place on a plate covered with wax paper.
Chill until firm.
To Serve, press the pecans into the ball and place the ball on the serving try with your favorite crackers.

name: Cheese Butter
directions: Combine all ingredients , and beat on lower speed with beaters until mix is fluffy.

name: Three in One Cheese Ball
directions: In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, cheddar cheese, milk, onion, and worcestershire sauce until fluffy.
If a smoother spread is desired, process in a food processor until creamy.
Divide into thirds (about 1 cup each).
Shape first portion into a ball and roll in cracked pepper.
Add the bleu cheese to the 2nd portion and mix well.  Shape into a ball and roll in parsley.
Add garlic powder to the remaining portion and mix well.  Shape into a ball and roll in nuts.
Cover and refrigerate.
Remove from refrigerator and let stand 15 minutes before serving.
Serve with crackers.

name: Spicy Cheese and Chicken Dip
directions: In a large bowl combine the cream cheese, drained chicken and 2 cups of the shredded colby jack until it's all pretty well incorporated.
Add the hot sauce to your taste.
Spread it into a 9 x 13 casserole dish and top with the remaining shredded cheese.
Bake at 350 for about 20 minutes or until the cheese on top is melted and bubbly.
Serve with corn and tortilla chips.

name: Blue Cheese Butter
directions: Allow blue cheese and butter to soften at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Combine all ingredients and mash together with a fork or process in a food processor.
Place a piece of wax or parchment paper on the counter and put the butter in the middle of it. Roll the paper up to form a log of butter and twist the ends to close.
Keep in the refrigerator for 3 weeks or freeze for up to 6 months sealed in a freezer bag.
